{{Infobox location
| name = Candle Bay
| introduced = ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow
}}

''See also: [[Candle Bay Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Candle Bay is a coastal location characterized by its busy harbor, which serves as a hub for merchants, fishermen, and navigators. The bay is directly connected to the [[Aion Sea]], a dangerous body of water inhabited by various monsters and phantoms. Within this bay, the [[Blackwatch]] have attempted to summon [[Elderspawn]]. The area is also home to the [[Candle Bay Playhouse]], which performs seasonal theatrical productions. A significant landmark in the region is the [[Candle Bay Imperial Prison]]. Formerly described as a site of torture that was better off destroyed, its ruins once resembled an avalanche-damaged hospital. Despite this history of destruction, the prison has recently reopened. The bay's waters are dark and can appear like black glass, and the surrounding area includes the town of [[Silverreach]], which features a lighthouse on its cliffs.}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Candle Bay is a harbor located directly adjacent to the [[Aion Sea]]. The waters of this location present a danger where ships could potentially sink, and the bay is visible from the window of [[Rojric]]'s prison cell. The area is patrolled by staff tasked with investigating prison breaks. During his journey, [[Calder]] jumped into the bay and used the location to abandon his contingency tools.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Candle Bay]] is a harbor.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c3">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Candle Bay]] is a location where the ship could potentially sink.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Candle Bay]] is a location.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c8">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Candle Bay]] is visible from the window in [[Rojric]]'s cell.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c15">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Candle Bay]] has staff that investigate prison breaks.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c19">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Candle Bay]] is directly connected to the [[Aion Sea]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c21">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Calder]] jumps into [[Candle Bay]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Candle Bay]] is a location where [[Calder]] abandoned contingency tools.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c24">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 24</ref>}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Kelarac]] made a bargain to escape [[Candle Bay]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c3">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Calder]] steered his ship toward [[Candle Bay]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c6">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 6</ref>}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Candle Bay]] is a location where the [[Lyathatan]] arrived.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c16">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Candle Bay]] was close to the group.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c25">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 25</ref>}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Candle Bay]] is a location where fish are caught.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c2">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|An armored [[Estyr Six]] flew over to [[Candle Bay]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c25">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 25</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|“He made a bargain to escape Candle Bay,” she went on, when the voices went silent.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c3" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Hawkers on Capital streets had promised “fresh Rainworth fish,” though the fish twenty miles south couldn’t be much different from those caught in Candle Bay itself.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c2" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire locations]]
